docstrings.CookieJar: A class to manage cookies for Scrapy requests.
docstrings.CookieJar.add_cookie_header: Add the Cookie header to the request based on the jar's contents.
docstrings.CookieJar.clear: Clear cookies matching the specified domain, path, and name.
docstrings.CookieJar.clear_session_cookies: Clear all session cookies from the jar.
docstrings.CookieJar.extract_cookies: Extract cookies from the response for the given request.
docstrings.CookieJar.make_cookies: Make cookies from the response and request.
docstrings.CookieJar.set_cookie: Set a specific cookie in the jar.
docstrings.CookieJar.set_cookie_if_ok: Set a cookie in the jar if the request is okay.
docstrings.CookieJar.set_policy: Set the cookie policy for the jar using pol.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.add_unredirected_header: Add a header with name and value to the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.full_url: The full URL of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_full_url: Get the full URL of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_header: Get the header value for name, with a default value.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_host: Get the host of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_type: Get the type of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.has_header: Check if the request has a header with name.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.header_items: Get all header items from the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.origin_req_host: The host of the original request.
docstrings.WrappedResponse: A wrapper for the Scrapy response object.
docstrings.WrappedResponse.get_all: Get all values for the header name, with a default.
docstrings.WrappedResponse.info: Return the info of the wrapped response.
